metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4721
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1c,d,e: Super-resolution imaging of hippocampal neuronal cultures showed anti-mGluR7 (GRM7) co-localized with Bassoon (BSN).

Figure 2,S2: Fluorescence recovery after photobleaching (FRAP) experiments showed surface-expressed mGluR7 was immobile and enriched in presynaptic boutons.

A model for mGluRs 2 and 7 is proposed in Figure 6. Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: M&M: "Dissociated hippocampal cultures from embryonic day 18 (E18) Wistar rat (Janvier Labs) brains of both genders were prepared as described previously"

antibody:
rabbit anti-mGluR7 (1:100 dilution, Merck Millipore, #07-239, RRID AB_310459)

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
